title: Gate-state: Starless Dimming Owl — inherited tree green pre-curator-handoff
body: Result: GREEN. pnpm check exit 0 at 10:50:00Z. 108 turbo tasks successful (0 cached, fresh run). Knip clean, prettier clean, markdownlint clean, depcruise clean (2298 modules, 4982 deps), sub-agent validation pass (22 Cursor wrappers, 22 Codex adapters, 19 templates), portability validation pass (19 canonical skills, 78 canonical rules, 22 reviewer adapters, 80 Cursor triggers, 78 Claude rules, 78 .agents rules), all UI/widget/a11y/e2e tests pass. Inherited tree carries Thermal Swooping Wing's curator-pass residue across 13 modified files + 4 new archives + 1 new pattern + 16+ comms events; Thermal validation at last update: practice:fitness:strict-hard SOFT only (20 soft, 21 healthy; hard 0, critical 0). Proceeding to curator-handoff commit under Starless attribution per owner direction, claim 88a657ce.
